title: Assertion (pTabItem[0].fg.jointype & JT_LEFT)==0 || ExprHasProperty(pOrExpr, EP_FromJoin) failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v1 ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL );
INSERT INTO v1 ( id, value ) VALUES ( 1, 'test' );
CREATE TABLE v2 ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES v1(id) );
INSERT INTO v2 ( id, ref_id ) VALUES ( 1, 1 );
SELECT * FROM v1 LEFT JOIN v2 ON v1.id = 1 OR v2.ref_id IS NULL WHERE v1.value = 'test' OR v1.id = 2;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with OR condition on primary key
